name: Driveitaway Holdings, Inc.
summary: DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. is a national dealer-focused mobility platform enabling car dealers to sell vehicles through eCommerce via an app-based subscription-to-ownership program called 'Drive Now, Decide Later.' The platform allows consumers regardless of credit history to subscribe to vehicles, with rental payments writing down the purchase price. The company also provides subscription programs for Electric Vehicles and offers dealers proprietary mobile technology, insurance coverages, and training.
